title: CobbleVentures
description: A pack where you and your pack of Cobblemon and animal friends head into the unknown.
body:
I designed this modpack to play with my friends!

CobbleVentures opens a world for explorers who want to forge bonds with companions all over. This modpack has been made in anticipation of Cobblemon's 1.6 update to 1.21.

1. **Assemble your team.** Train and tame creatures both mystical and mundane. Together, no challenge is impossible.
2. **Leave no stone unturned.** Roam the landscape and uncover secrets sealed by deep time. Encounter sights and settlements most would be lucky to dream of.
3. **Taste the flavors of every corner.** Prepare delicious meals from the fruits of your travels.
4. **Enjoy a Minecraft experience familiar and unfamiliar all the same.** Like its Forge counterpart, CobbleVentures aims to have a vibe that reminds players of vanilla Minecraft but with features that take immersion (and convenience) to another level.
